hero.headline: Websites built to attract clients and grow with your business
hero.subtitle: High-end websites built to convert. AI workflow automations when you're ready to scale.

items.title: 10+ Years of Excellence
items.desc: Together, we bring over a decade of hands-on experience as software developers at top Swiss companies — combining technical expertise with design clarity.

items.title: AI, Google & Speed Optimized
items.desc: Built for accessibility, reliability, and visibility across search engines and AI platforms so your business gets found everywhere clients look.

items.title: 0 Hours of Maintenance
items.desc: Your Webflow website runs smoothly with automatic updates and no plugins to manage, so you can focus on your business.

items.title: Direct Collaboration
items.desc: Work directly with the founders for clear communication and consistent quality.

items.title: 24/7 Time Savings
items.desc: Intelligent AI automations handle repetitive tasks around the clock, freeing you to focus on what really matters.

items.title: Easy Updates
items.desc: Once your site is live, you'll have full control. Editing content is simple and intuitive.

services.title: Practical Solutions That Move Your Business Forward

items.title: Web Design
items.desc: We design websites that feel intuitive and simple to navigate. Everything has a purpose, nothing gets added just because it "looks cool." We want your visitors to feel at ease — and to find what they need quickly.

items.title: Web Development
items.desc: Most of the websites we build are made in Webflow, so you can easily update and maintain them yourself. For more custom projects, we choose the right stack together—React, Next.js, or Astro—along with reliable infrastructure for hosting and deployment. The goal is always the same: it should just work.

items.title: Website Migrations
items.desc: If your current setup, whether it's WordPress, Wix, or something more custom, feels heavy, outdated, or hard to manage, we'll help you move to a smoother, easier system without losing anything important along the way.

items.title: SEO & Analytics (Essentials)
items.desc: We make your site easy to understand — for both search engines and AI search tools. Clear structure, meaningful content, and simple analytics so you always know what's working.

items.title: AI Automations & Workflows
items.desc: Simple, practical automations that handle repetitive tasks and free up your time. We build small, reliable workflows using tools like n8n to sort documents, process information, and organize data, so you can focus on what matters.

stories.title: Our Story
stories.text: Before founding Moniré, we met as frontend developers at brack.ch, one of Switzerland's largest online retailers. Our paths to tech were unconventional—consulting, HR, and veterinary medicine—and we realized these diverse backgrounds were our shared strength. We don't just write code; we understand business challenges from multiple angles. That's why we founded Moniré: to partner with businesses who need more than technical skills, but genuine care and investment in their growth.

stories.title: Why Choose A Duo?
stories.text: A small team means you're never just a number. With us, you get direct access to senior-level expertise and a passionate duo who genuinely care about your success. As working mothers, we structure our work around efficiency and impact, ensuring every decision delivers real value for our clients.

stories.title: Giving Back
stories.text: Every year, we support one non-profit or meaningful initiative with a complimentary design or development project. Know an organization that could benefit?

custom.title: Need Something More Specific?
custom.desc: We know every project is different. If you need support beyond the packages above, we’re happy to tailor a custom scope. We also collaborate with trusted partners in photography, social media, and copywriting, so everything can be coordinated in one place.

webDesign.name: Starter
webDesign.desc: A clean, professional website you can manage yourself
features: Edit text & images yourself (no developer needed)
Training on how to manage your site

webDesign.name: Advanced
webDesign.desc: A flexible website that grows with your business
features: Content management for blogs, case studies, and services
SEO optimization focused on ranking + analytics with event tracking
1-2 third-party integrations (ex. booking system, CRM, etc.)

webDesign.name: Premium
webDesign.desc: A digital platform for your workflows and operations
features: Multiple third-party integrations (e.g. booking, live chat, client portal, newsletter automations)
Content that connects across your site (e.g. services linked to case studies)

automationBlock.title: AI Automations & Workflow Systems
automationBlock.desc: We build custom automation systems that reduce manual, repetitive work and seamlessly connect the tools you already use. Pricing is defined individually after a short discovery call.

projects.title: Snip Squad
projects.desc: A vibrant veterinary clinic website designed to be warm, approachable, and easy to navigate for pet owners.

projects.title: SystemicAlly
projects.desc: Corporate leadership development platform with a clean, professional design emphasizing trust and expertise.

projects.title: Towarowa 41
projects.desc: An elegant luxury apartment listing with editorial photography and refined typography.

projects.title: Expense Receipt Automation
projects.desc: Automated expense receipt processing workflow using n8n, eliminating manual data entry and saving hours of repetitive work.

items.q: What information do you need from me to get started?
items.a: We need to understand your business goals, target audience, required features, design preferences, timeline, and budget. If you already have brand assets, content, or an existing website, that helps too. You can also fill out our client brief form so we can better understand your needs.
Our core focus is development and AI automations, but we build every website with SEO best practices in mind. We can also recommend trusted partners for ongoing SEO services.

items.q: Do you work with international clients?
items.a: Yes. We are based in Switzerland and work remotely with clients worldwide. Our communication process is async-friendly, and we coordinate meetings across time zones.

items.q: Do you build custom websites or use templates?
items.a: We mainly build custom websites tailored to your business and goals. If needed, we can also adapt premium templates for smaller budgets or faster timelines.

items.q: Can you redesign my existing website?
items.a: Yes. We offer full redesigns, including modernizing outdated visuals, improving user experience, and migrating to a better platform when needed.

items.q: What platforms do you build on?
items.a: We work with Webflow, Astro, React, Next.js, n8n, and custom solutions. We recommend the best option based on your needs, budget, and long-term plans.

items.q: Can I edit the website myself?
items.a: Absolutely. We use user-friendly CMS setups so you can update text, images, and posts without technical skills. We also provide training and documentation.
Once all invoices are paid, full ownership of the website and all project assets we created is transferred to you.

items.q: I already have a design — can you do development only?
items.a: Yes. If you already have the design, we can handle development only. We’ll review your design together and scope the work accordingly.

items.q: How quickly can my website be completed?
items.a: Timelines depend on website size and complexity. After our discovery call, we provide a clear estimate for design and development phases.
Webflow is a modern website platform that lets us build fully custom, high-quality sites quickly, with easy content editing, strong performance, and reliable hosting.

items.q: What is AI automation and how can it help my business?
items.a: AI automation uses artificial intelligence to handle repetitive tasks, analyze data, and streamline operations. Examples include customer support flows, data entry, email handling, and content workflows — helping you save time and reduce errors.

items.q: Do I need technical knowledge to use AI automation tools?
items.a: No. We build user-friendly solutions that fit into your existing workflow. We also provide onboarding and documentation so your team can use everything confidently.
Yes. We offer maintenance packages that include bug fixes, content updates, and technical support. One-off support is also available for specific needs.

footer.tagline: Custom website development and AI-powered workflow automation in Switzerland.

before.title: Before:
before.intro: Expenses were tracked manually. Receipts arrived by email and post. As a result:
items: Receipts were processed manually with high risk of errors.
Files were stored inconsistently across folders.
Manual data entry into Excel led to missing receipts and delays.

after.title: After:
after.intro: Receipts are now sent via email or Telegram and processed automatically.
items: Images/PDFs are extracted and cleaned via OCR.
Date, amount, currency, and vendor are identified with AI.
Files are renamed and stored in the correct OneDrive monthly folder.
Data is added into the correct Excel table (EUR or CHF).
Everything stays organized & ready for reimbursement review.

impact.title: Impact:
impact.intro: A messy monthly task became a clean, reliable, hands-off workflow.
